title: SaaS PSR create, HTTPS mixed-content fix, wildcard TLS tooling
description:
SaaS tenants on *.pipeshare.net could not add new PSR clients/jobsites because scope checks ran before the first record existed, and planner writes still hit the base Wasabi snapshot. Tenant-bound users with planner access can now create jobs in their isolated tenant snapshot; scopes are granted automatically on create.

Browsers showed "Not secure" despite a valid wildcard cert when Wasabi presigned URLs or subresources used http://. Presigned URLs and S3 endpoints are forced to HTTPS; SaaS nginx sends upgrade-insecure-requests.

GoDaddy DNS-01 scripts issue and renew *.pipeshare.net certs for tenant subdomains.

Who is affected: SaaS customers on techpipe.pipeshare.net and future *.pipeshare.net tenants.
changeLog: SaaS PSR Add Client / Create jobsite works for tenant workspace owners.
Planner records and scopes write to per-tenant Wasabi snapshot, not base PipeShare.
Wasabi presigned GET/PUT URLs forced to HTTPS (fixes mixed-content warnings).
nginx SaaS vhost: upgrade-insecure-requests CSP header.
GoDaddy certbot hooks + apply-saas-tenant-nginx-ssl.sh for *.pipeshare.net TLS.
